fields.name: actor
fields.description: The user or system performing the action.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The specific operation performed on the entity.

fields.name: entityType
fields.description: The type of entity that was modified.

fields.name: entityId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the entity being audited.
fields.synonyms: entity identifier, record id, item id

fields.name: before
fields.description: The state of the entity prior to the modification.

fields.name: after
fields.description: The state of the entity after a modification.

fields.name: recordedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the audit event was recorded.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Capture before/after snapshots
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true, persist `before` and `after` object snapshots from @payload.data on each audit row. Default off to keep audit rows small.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Entity to audit
overridableConfigKeys.description: Type name of the entity whose mutations get logged

overridableConfigKeys.label: Event-kind filter
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, only @payload.data.kind values in this list are audited. Empty list = capture every event. Requires the upstream event to include a `kind` field on its payload.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enabled
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether the audit trail is active for the host orbital. Off by default; turn on to record mutations.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, audit, audit trail, log changes, track changes, who edited what, mutation log, change history, edit history, modification log, accountability log, record changes, log every edit, compliance log

overridableConfigKeys.label: Skip fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity fields to omit from the audit payload (declarative; before/after still capture all fields in v1.1 — field exclusion lands when captureBeforeAfter wiring filters per-field).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Retention (days)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Days to keep audit rows. Default 2555 (7 years) for typical compliance regimes. WIRING DEFERRED: retention enforcement requires composing `std-lifecycle` against AuditEntry with a delete rule (gap — docs/Almadar_Std_Factories.md).
